evals.name: all-time-chinese
evals.prompt: 帮我做个 token 年度报告
evals.expected_output: Folder at ~/Desktop/tokenbar-report-YYYY-MM-DD/ containing index.html (interactive card-draw landing) + 3 themed persona HTML files (01-jojo.html / 02-bleach.html / 03-hxh.html) + data.json. Narrative in Chinese. Window covers full TokenBar data range (all-time).

assertions.text: output folder exists under ~/Desktop matching tokenbar-report-* pattern
exactly 3 persona HTML files present (01-jojo.html, 02-bleach.html, 03-hxh.html)
index.html present, contains card-draw JS (a 'drawBtn' element), and links to all 3 persona files
01-jojo.html contains the SVG stand-stats radar (class 'stand-radar'), psyche-card blocks, stand-card block, and a stand-card-cry block
01-jojo.html persona badge reads 'JOJO' — grep for the badge contents

01-jojo.html stand-card-name is one of the S-tier whitelist entries (e.g. ザ・ワールド / スタープラチナ / クレイジー・ダイヤモンド / ゴールド・エクスペリエンス / キング・クリムゾン / メイド・イン・ヘブン / タスク act 4 / D4C / キラークイーン / etc.). NEVER an invented name like 'BLACKOUT MIDNIGHT'.
02-bleach.html contains a reiatsu-stats / 灵压 block, a psyche-card or 心相 block, and a zanpakuto-card block naming a real zanpakuto (千本桜景厳 / 天鎖斬月 / 流刃若火 / 鏡花水月 / 双殛 / etc.)
02-bleach.html persona badge reads '死神' (BLEACH)
03-hxh.html contains a nen-assessment block (hex radar over 6 系: 強化/操作/具現化/放出/変化/特質), an ability-design block with a named ability + 制约と誓约, and a nen-progression block
03-hxh.html persona badge reads '猎人' (HxH)
data.json present, parses as JSON, has cost.totalUSD > 0 and dataWindow.eventCount > 0
every persona HTML opens in a browser without console errors
no leftover '{{placeholder}}' tokens anywhere in any rendered HTML
narrative text in every persona is in Chinese (matching the prompt's language)
the 3 persona themes are visually distinct — at minimum, their <style> blocks differ by > 60% content hash

no shared 'profile-card' dossier section exists in any persona HTML — v5+ killed the shared dossier (search for 'profile-card' class should miss in all 3 files); each persona must own its identity_card section
each persona renders its own题材化 identity_card section: jojo uses 替身/dossier language; bleach uses 護廷十三隊/灵压/斩魄刀 language; hxh uses 念能力者/系/オーラ language
lens isolation: jojo must not mention 斩魄刀/灵压/卍解/念能力/系/オーラ; bleach must not mention 替身/A-E 六维/念能力/系/オーラ; hxh must not mention 替身/A-E 六维/斩魄刀/卍解/灵压

CRITICAL: max pairwise content overlap across the 3 rendered persona HTML files (narrative text only, ignoring <style> + <script> + chrome) must be STRICTLY LESS THAN 0.30 (30%) measured via scripts/measure_overlap.py — this is the v6 hard requirement

evals.name: windowed-30d-mixed
evals.prompt: 最近一个月我在 AI 上烧了多少？做个 html wrap 看看
evals.expected_output: Same output structure as eval 1 but time window narrowed to the last 30 days. Numbers must reflect the narrower window (smaller token counts, fewer events).

assertions.text: output folder exists under ~/Desktop matching tokenbar-report-* pattern
exactly 3 persona HTML files (01-jojo, 02-bleach, 03-hxh) + index.html present
date_range_days in the report equals 30 (±1)
total_tokens in the report is strictly less than the all-time figure
before generation, the assistant confirmed the time window with the user OR explicitly stated the inferred window
narrative is in Chinese with informal register (matches the user's casual phrasing)
max pairwise overlap < 0.30 (measure_overlap.py)

evals.name: english-quarter
evals.prompt: Generate an HTML report of my AI coding usage this quarter — show me how I've been spending tokens.
evals.expected_output: Same output structure, but narrative in English. Window covers the last calendar quarter (~90 days).

assertions.text: output folder exists under ~/Desktop matching tokenbar-report-* pattern
exactly 3 persona HTML files + index.html present

narrative text in every persona is in English (matching the prompt's language). Title-bar persona badges may stay as 'JOJO' / 'BLEACH' / 'HxH'; 题材-specific OWNED nouns (替身 / 斩魄刀 / 念能力 / 系) may stay as the canonical Japanese/Chinese terms; the surrounding prose must be English.
date_range_days is between 80 and 100 (i.e. roughly a quarter)
max pairwise overlap < 0.30 (measure_overlap.py)
